allow: Bash(node -e "const q = require\('./questions'\); console.log\('Total questions:', q.length\); const ids = q.map\(x=>x.id\); const dupes = ids.filter\(\(id,i\)=>ids.indexOf\(id\)!==i\); console.log\('Duplicate IDs:', dupes.length ? dupes : 'none'\); const missingFields = q.filter\(x=>!x.question||!x.options||x.options.length!==4||!x.correct||!x.explanation\); console.log\('Malformed entries:', missingFields.length ? missingFields.map\(x=>x.id\) : 'none'\);")
